hypothesis: If material synthesis procedures are extracted with o4-mini using one-shot prompting that includes a complex in-context example, then structural and parametric F1 and collection rate will exceed those achieved by GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, zero-shot prompting, and simpler one-shot examples because higher-capacity modeling combined with richer demonstrations improves identification of procedures and accurate mapping of nodes, edges, and attributes.
